---
name: Specification issue
about: Propose or review normative or explanatory specification text
title: "[Spec]: "
labels: "spec, review"
assignees: ""
---

## Spec Section

Identify the affected spec and section.

## Current Text Or Behavior

Quote or summarize the current text or behavior.

## Problem

Explain the ambiguity, conflict, gap, or interoperability risk.

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed text or behavior.

## Compatibility Impact

Describe any effect on existing schemas, examples, event types, registries, APIs, or implementations.

## Security / Privacy Impact

Describe security, privacy, abuse, and selective-disclosure implications.

## Related Protocols Or Standards

List relevant DID, VC, AP2, x402, HTTP Message Signatures, OAuth/OIDC, SPIFFE/SPIRE, payment, blockchain, or PQC references.

## Additional Context

Add any other useful information.
